allow: Bash(curl -s https://api.github.com/users/Jerry2999 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Name: {d.get\(\\"name\\"\)}\\nBio: {d.get\(\\"bio\\"\)}\\nLocation: {d.get\(\\"location\\"\)}\\nBlog: {d.get\(\\"blog\\"\)}\\nRepos: {d.get\(\\"public_repos\\"\)}\\nAvatar: {d.get\(\\"avatar_url\\"\)}'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Not found")
